history.content: Set up a small project scratchpad: create a notes/ folder, add a README.md explaining it's my scratch area, create three empty daily note files for today and the next two days named by date, then list the folder so I can confirm it's all there.

steps.title: Create README.md explaining it's a scratch area
Create three empty daily note files for today and next two days
List the folder to confirm everything is there

entries.label: filesystem → write_file
entries.detail:
{"content":"# Notes - My Scratch Area

This is my personal scratchpad for quick notes, ideas, and temporary work.

Feel free to use this space for:
- Quick brainstorming
- Meeting notes
- Task tracking
- Idea dumping
- Temporary files and resources

Clean up as needed or leave things here as-is!
","path":"notes/README.md"}
